overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in a green dress walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at dusk. The character ascends and descends illuminated stairs, crosses streets with light traffic, and walks through covered corridors with reflective surfaces and teal neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide illuminated staircase in futuristic plaza

events.description: character begins ascending wide concrete stairs with blue neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up illuminated stairs toward upper plaza level

entered.detail: wide staircase with embedded cyan-blue neon strip lights along edges
glowing blue LED strips illuminating each step
futuristic high-rise with illuminated windows and neon accents
large digital screen displaying a face with pink and red hues
multi-story building with vertical purple neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide concrete staircase illuminated by blue neon lights in an open futuristic plaza. Tall cyberpunk buildings surround the area with a prominent pink holographic billboard visible in the distance against a dusky sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian platform above city street

events.description: reaches top of stairs and transitions to walking across upper plaza
begins descending stairs on the opposite side of the platform

agents.ego_description: walking across upper plaza then descending stairs toward street level

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving along the road below the platform

entered.detail: flat concrete surface at top of stairs
trees wrapped with white and pink decorative lighting
multi-lane street with moving traffic visible below
second set of stairs leading down to street level

segments.scene_description: The character crosses an elevated plaza with decorative lit trees, then descends a second staircase toward street level. A yellow taxi passes on the road below as the character moves from the open upper level toward the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with neon-lit buildings and decorative trees

events.description: vehicles pass by on the adjacent road including a yellow taxi
character turns right toward building entrance with covered walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along street level sidewalk, crossing near traffic and approaching building entrance

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving past on the street

entered.detail: dark paved street with yellow lane markings
trees with pink blossoms and string lights
tall building with illuminated green-tinted windows

segments.scene_description: At street level, the character walks along a sidewalk next to a road with light traffic including a yellow taxi and red sports car. Decorative cherry blossom trees with lights line the path as the character approaches a building entrance with a covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian corridor with teal neon lighting and hotel entrance

events.description: enters covered walkway from open plaza, lighting shifts to artificial neon
environment becomes darker with dominant teal neon illumination

agents.ego_description: walking into covered corridor with reflective floors, passing by digital screens

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near large digital screen taking a photo

entered.detail: transition point from open plaza to enclosed corridor
vertical cyan light strips running along corridor walls
shiny dark floor reflecting the teal neon lights
neon sign reading 'WILD BLUE HOTEL & SPA' in teal and pink
large display showing colorful abstract flower artwork

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered corridor with highly reflective floors and vertical teal neon light strips. A large digital screen displays colorful flower art on the right while the 'Wild Blue Hotel & Spa' neon sign becomes visible on the left. The environment shifts from natural dusk light to artificial neon illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed neon-lit hotel corridor with reflective surfaces

agents.ego_description: continuing through covered corridor with teal neon lighting, approaching distant exit

entered.detail: dark overhead structure with recessed lighting
bright light indicating corridor exit in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks deeper into the enclosed corridor, moving away from the hotel entrance toward a distant exit. The teal neon pillars continue along the right side while the reflective floor mirrors the cyan lighting. The corridor walls create a narrow, immersive neon-lit passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an open, dusky futuristic plaza into a narrow, artificial neon-lit corridor. It begins with the character ascending a wide concrete staircase illuminated by blue neon lights, surrounded by towering buildings and a distant pink holographic billboard. As the character crosses an elevated plaza with decorative lit trees, the camera descends a second staircase toward street level, where a yellow taxi and red sports car pass by along a sidewalk lined with glowing cherry blossom trees. The scene then shifts as the character enters a covered walkway, moving from the natural dusk light into a corridor of highly reflective floors and vertical teal neon strips featuring a digital flower screen and the Wild Blue Hotel & Spa sign. Finally, the camera follows the character deeper into this enclosed passage, where the environment becomes a narrow immersive tunnel of cyan lighting and mirrored surfaces.
